title: Arcade Game with RUNE SDK
description: An arcade game developed with RUNE SDK in a project course.
details: The game is a 2D platformer where the player controls a pirate character escaping from sinking island platforms, while also has to dodge sharks swimming forwards the islands. The game is timebased and goes faster the longer you play. Developed with RUNE SDK, a game engine developed by the Media Technology and Data Science faculty at Linnaeus University.
